_note: Operational settings for the sourcing pipeline. Signal points live in scoring.json, never here.

fullenrich._note: Endpoints reconstructed from FullEnrich's documented v1 API (docs.fullenrich.com). VERIFY against the live docs on the first keyed run; the client prints every request before sending.
fullenrich.search_note: Search API (person resolution) is NOT wired. Cost model: 0.25 credits per person exported vs 1 credit per work email / 10 per mobile on Enrich. Set search_enabled true only after Joe approves the cost model.
